description_long: This is a small, single-tier cake with a rounded base and a thick layer of glossy chocolate ganache covering the top, slightly dripping over the edge. The cake itself is a golden-brown color, suggesting a classic sponge or butter cake. A single, thick red candle with a yellow flame is positioned upright in the center of the cake, adding a celebratory touch. The surface of the ganache is smooth and shiny, contrasting with the matte, slightly textured appearance of the cake base. There are no additional decorations or embellishments, giving the cake a minimalist and straightforward appearance. The cake is not displayed on any plate or stand, and the bottom edge is directly exposed.
description: A small, single-tier golden cake with glossy chocolate ganache and a single red candle on top. The design is minimalist and unadorned.
description_view_0: The cake is seen with the candle slightly leaning to the left, and the ganache appears to drip more on the left side.
description_view_1: The candle is upright and centered, with the ganache evenly distributed and a smooth, rounded cake base visible.
description_view_2: The candle leans slightly to the right, and the ganache has a subtle overhang on the right edge.
description_view_3: The candle is upright, and the ganache appears thickest at the front edge, with the cake base fully visible.
